minimal.concept: Bright and calming café using warm white tones, light oak wood, soft neutral furniture, and natural light. Designed to make the 45 sq.m space feel clean, open, and relaxing.
improvements: Install a curved light-oak counter
Add warm ambient and pendant lighting
Use light-wood seating and bench furniture
Improve layout and customer walkways

modern.concept: Contemporary urban café with dark wood, stone surfaces, black metal details, and warm lighting. Suitable for working professionals and casual social gatherings.
improvements: Install a stone and timber service counter
Add feature ceiling and track lighting
Upgrade back-bar storage and display
Add modern seating and exterior signage

luxury.concept: Premium café with marble finishes, brushed-gold details, warm dark tones, and comfortable upholstered chairs. Designed to create an elegant lounge-like atmosphere.
improvements: Install a marble counter with gold accents
Add decorative and indirect lighting
Upgrade flooring and wall finishes
Add premium armchairs and branded signage

minimal.concept: Simple, clean Japanese-style Shabu with light wooden furniture, neutral fabrics, and warm recessed lights for a serene family dining experience.
improvements: Install light wood induction tables and benches
Mount minimal bamboo partitions between tables
Set up standard individual pot ventilation system

modern.concept: Hip and energetic modern Shabu featuring neon signs, dark gray tiles, industrial steel tables, and dynamic track lighting.
improvements: Install neon accent walls and custom signage
Upgrade ventilation to high-performance exhaust hoods
Install digital touchscreen ordering tablets at tables

luxury.concept: Premium private Shabu dining experience with dark stone finishes, golden trims, private VIP rooms, and automated service trays.
improvements: Construct soundproof private VIP dining rooms
Install premium marble-top tables with integrated touch controls
Incorporate gold accent dividers and luxury cutlery cabinets

minimal.concept: Zen-like clinic focusing on warm wood, cream white colors, and soft lighting to reduce patient anxiety. Clear and spacious walkways.
improvements: Add soft ambient recessed LED lighting
Place minimal wooden reception desks and clean seating
Set up comfortable lounge chairs in the lobby

modern.concept: Sleek, futuristic medical clinic with blue LED accents, clean white panels, digital kiosks, and glass consultation rooms.
improvements: Install digital check-in touchscreen kiosks
Add smart frosted-glass partition panels
Integrate medical-grade clean air filtration systems

luxury.concept: High-end wellness clinic with gold fixtures, marble lobby, private recovery suites, and premium aromatherapy lounge.
improvements: Add custom marble reception counter with gold trims
Set up VIP recovery suites with leather recliners
Install high-end dimmable chandelier lighting

minimal.concept: Minimalist fashion boutique with clean plaster walls, simple racks, and natural lighting. Focuses on giving garments maximum space.
improvements: Install sleek wall-mounted clothing rails
Add single large oak display table
Mount frameless round mirrors in dressing area

modern.concept: Industrial modern clothing store with exposed metal pipe racks, concrete floors, neon tags, and black steel frames.
improvements: Add track spotlighting system and spotlight grids
Construct metal pipe and wire mesh display racks
Install digital checkout counter with matte-black finishes

luxury.concept: High-end luxury boutique with marble flooring, gold metallic hangers, plush velvet fitting rooms, and private shopping lounges.
improvements: Create luxury velvet-draped fitting rooms
Install gold-plated custom display racks and marble pillars
Add comfortable leather sofas and designer perfume displays

minimal.concept: Clean and tiny grab-and-go milk tea shop styled in cream and white tones. Hidden prep area to keep the counter clean.
improvements: Set up compact white service counter
Mount minimal digital menu screen
Optimize pickup queue space for delivery riders

modern.concept: Urban modern bubble tea bar with color-changing LED strips, stainless steel counters, and trendy street-style posters.
improvements: Install RGB LED accent under-counter lights
Add stainless steel preparation counter and sinks
Set up modern self-service ordering touchscreen kiosk

luxury.concept: Premium tea salon featuring marble tables, gold accents, comfortable sit-down booths, and elegant glass displays for organic tea leaves.
improvements: Add marble-topped preparation bar and backlights
Install brass menu frames and premium glass display cabinets
Set up cozy seating booths with velvet cushions
